message:
Merge PR #2721: fix: auto-repair missing refinery worktree on startup

Self-heals missing refinery worktree from the shared bare repo instead
of falling back to mayor/rig (which confuses the refinery agent). Also
adds the auto-repair path to the doctor fix.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2721
Author: Cdfghglz
